summary: Tested 4 Axis Library publish-flow assertions with a researcher account and all 4 passed. Publishing two packs with the same shared axis key created one pack-publish library entry, incremented usageCount to 2, and showed the in-use delete warning.

assertions.reason: Opening Delete on the published axis showed a warning that it was in use 2 times across published packs.
Publishing persona packs with sharedAxes populated the Axis Library automatically and the resulting row showed creation source Pack publish.
After publishing a second pack with the same axis key in the same org, the existing library row showed usageCount 2 instead of duplicating the row.
The researcher account successfully created draft packs, added proto-personas, published both packs, and accessed Axis Library mutation controls throughout the flow.

frictions: Publish remained disabled until at least one proto-persona was saved, so each draft pack required extra setup before the publish assertions could run.
The pack-detail flow needed explicit waits after proto-persona save and publish to let the UI settle before evidence capture.
